Instructions for calculating and storing the SHA1 checksum of incoming request data in a WSGI environment.

# Purpose
The content describes a method to calculate the SHA1 checksum of incoming request data in a web application using the WSGI environment. It introduces a class `ChecksumCalcStream` that wraps the input stream to compute the checksum as data is read. The `generate_checksum` function modifies the WSGI environment by replacing the input stream with an instance of `ChecksumCalcStream`, allowing the checksum to be calculated during data consumption. This approach is useful for APIs that require data integrity verification. The example usage demonstrates how to integrate this checksum calculation into a route handler, ensuring the checksum is fully constructed after the input stream is parsed.
